title: T-023 — API: Routing cost preview (GET /api/technical/items/:code/routings/:v/cost-preview)
prompt:
# T-023 — API: Routing cost preview (GET /api/technical/items/:code/routings/:v/cost-preview)

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §12.4
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Routing cost preview endpoint summing setup + run × volume × cost_per_hour.

Single SQL query with arithmetic, returns array of operations + total. No write side effects.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/api/technical/items/[item_code]/routings/[version]/cost-preview/route.ts [create]
- tests/api/routing-cost-preview.test.ts [create]

## Out of scope
- BOM cost roll-up (10-FINANCE)

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given routing with one op (setup=30 min, run=10 sec, cost=60/h) and volume=100, when GET, then op_cost = 30 + 16.67 ≈ 46.67 (within 0.01).
2. Given missing volume param, when GET, then 422.
3. Given cross-org request, when GET, then 404 (RLS).

## Test strategy
- RED tests for arithmetic precision + RLS.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/api/routing-cost-preview.test.ts

## Risk red lines
- Do not write to any table — read-only.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
